children.heading: Liability
children.label: a Liability
children.text: Excluding section 1706, nothing in this title shall be construed to supersede, enlarge, or diminish the common law or statutory liabilities of any grantee, subgrantee, contractor, subcontractor, or other party covered by section 106(g) of the Trafficking Victims Protection Act of 2000 (), as amended by section 1702.22 U.S.C. 7104(g)

children.heading: Authority of Department of Justice
children.label: b Authority of Department of Justice
children.text: Nothing in this title shall be construed as diminishing or otherwise modifying the authority of the Attorney General to investigate activities covered by this title.

children.label: A
children.text: Not later than 270 days after , the Federal Acquisition Regulation shall be amended to carry out the requirements of sections 1702, 1703, and 1704(c), and the second sentence of section 1704(a)(1), of this title.January 2, 2013

children.label: B
children.text: The requirements of sections 1702, 1703, and 1704(c), and the second sentence of section 1704(a)(1), of this title, shall apply to grants, contracts, and cooperative agreements entered into on or after the date that is 270 days after , and to task and delivery orders awarded on or after such date pursuant to contracts entered before, on, or after such date.January 2, 2013

children.heading: Investigative and procedural requirements
children.label: 2 Investigative and procedural requirements
children.text: Federal agencies shall implement the requirements of sections 1704, 1705, and 1707 (other than subsection (c) of section 1704) not later than 90 days after .January 2, 2013

children.heading: Criminal law changes
children.label: 3 Criminal law changes
children.text: The amendments made by section 1706 shall take effect upon the date of enactment and shall apply to conduct taking place on or after such date.
